subject: Phantump — a small ghost creature consisting of a round dark stump with a tiny brown log base and bare branching twig-like horns, floating in a dim forest.
description: A small creature appears to be a haunted tree stump — a dark rounded body with a short wooden log portion at the base and small bare branching twigs growing from the top like horns. The creature has simple dot eyes and floats slightly above the ground. The background is a dark, atmospheric forest with dim light filtering through trees and glowing orbs or spores floating in the air. The palette is earthy brown and deep purple-grey.
foreground: small dark haunted tree stump creature with twig horns, floating above forest floor
background: dim forest, dark trees, floating glowing orbs
